title: Croptopia x Terralith Compat
description: Make your Croptopia seeds drop from grass!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
## Full release now available! Works on versions 1.20 - 26.1.2

A simple datapack to make all Croptopia seeds drop from grass. This datapack is mostly meant to fix compatibility between Terralith and Croptopia since Terralith worlds do not spawn Croptopia Crops naturally.

Seeds drop from Short and Tall Grass, Fern, Large Fern and Dead Bush.

---
[Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia) mod is required for this datapack to work properly.

**Available for versions:**
- 1.20
- 1.20.1
- 1.20.2
- 1.20.4
- 1.20.6
- 1.21
- 1.21.1
- 26.1
- 26.1.1
- 26.1.2

![Description image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a386093359991ec5c84aff5442e7bf5178528564.png)
